results.extracted_text:
--- PAGE 1 ---
MINISTRY OF HEALTH — REPUBLIC OF ALGERIA
National Medical Council | Directorate of Professional Licensing
Official Medical Practitioner Credential Certificate
Cert No: DZ-MED-2024-04821
Issued under Act No. 85-05 of February 16, 1985 relating to the Protection and Promotion of Health
CERTIFICATE OF MEDICAL LICENSURE
This is to certify that the practitioner listed below has met all requirements
for medical practice in the Republic of Algeria
Dr. Ahmed Benali
Date of Birth March 15, 1978
SPECIALTY: CARDIOLOGY Nationality Algerian
Medical School University of Algiers — Faculty of Medicine
PHOTO
Graduation Year 2004
License Number: DZ-CARD-2024-004821
License Type: Full Medical License — Specialist
Issuing Authority: National Medical Council of Algeria (CNOM)
Date of Issue: January 10, 2024
Expiry Date: January 10, 2027
Country: Algeria
Authorized to practice:
Clinical Cardiology | Interventional Cardiology | Echocardiography | Cardiac Rehabilitation | Telemedicine Consultations
Conditions:
This certificate is valid only within the territory of Algeria. Practice in other jurisdictions requires local registration.
Dr. Karim Messaoud Prof. Nadia Hamdi Dr. Youcef Brahimi
Director General Minister of Health Head of Licensing
National Medical Council Republic of Algeria Directorate of Licensing
QR VERIFY
OFFICIAL
SEAL DZ-MED-04821
CNOM — 2024
This document is issued by the National Medical Council of Algeria | Verify at: www.cnom.dz/verify | Tel: +213 21 XX XX XX
